title: Deep learning for protein secondary structure prediction: Pre and post-AlphaFold
source: Ismi et al., Computational and Structural Biotechnology Journal, 2022

L2: Deep learning methods for protein structure prediction have been transformed by AlphaFold
Review compares pre- and post-AlphaFold approaches to secondary structure prediction
L3: Comprehensive review of deep learning approaches for protein secondary structure prediction, comparing methodologies before and after AlphaFold's breakthrough, examining neural network architectures and their impact on structural bioinformatics
